title: My resources
subtitle: Keep your private documents and useful links in one clean space. Admin-shared files and your own uploads both live here.
formDescription: Upload a private document for yourself or save a useful link so it stays easy to find later.
resourceDescriptionPlaceholder: Add a short note so you remember why this resource matters.
uploadHelper: Supported: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, TXT, or CSV up to 15 MB.
listDescription: Everything shared with you by the admin and everything you have uploaded for yourself in one place.
emptyDescription: When an admin shares a document or you upload one yourself, it will appear here.
deleteConfirm: Delete this resource? This action cannot be undone.
validationFile: Upload a document before saving this resource.
cannotDeleteAdmin: Admin-shared resources cannot be deleted from your space.
